step.title: Load PRD and available artifacts
step.action: If ux-spec or tech-research exist, load them for additional context.

step.title: Design system overview
step.action: Create a high-level system overview: context diagram, system boundaries, external integrations.

step.title: Define components and boundaries
step.action: Decompose the system into components with clear responsibilities and boundaries.
Define component interfaces and communication patterns.

step.title: Design API contracts
step.action: Define API contracts for each component: endpoints, request/response schemas, error handling.

step.title: Design data model
step.action: Design the data model: entities, relationships, constraints, and storage strategy.

step.title: Select technology stack
step.action: Select technologies for each architectural concern with clear rationale.

step.title: Document architecture decision records
step.action: Write ADRs for each significant architectural decision: context, decision, consequences.

step.title: Produce architecture document
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with architecture details.
